MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nelson Chao is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Steadham is present.
Attorney Daniel W. Wayne representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Anne Hipshman, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of AUG-27-2012 is vacated.
